findings.title: SQL Injection via direct string concatenation in product search
findings.description: User-supplied query parameter concatenated directly into SQL LIKE clause without parameterization

findings.title: SQL Injection via format string in order filter builder
findings.description: Helper function uses str.format() to embed user-supplied filter values into SQL WHERE clause fragments

findings.title: SQL Injection via unvalidated ORDER BY sort direction
findings.description: Sort column is validated against allowlist but sort direction parameter is interpolated into ORDER BY clause without validation
